title: Mini Christmas Trees
description: A highly customizable Mini Christmas Tree Resource Pack with 1+ Billion Combos

![Mini Christmas Trees Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1567cafff7f76f3c3844594d61396dcad486244b_0.webp)

# Mini Christmas Trees

Mini Christmas Trees is a unique Minecraft Resource Pack that allows you to make customizable Mini Trees to be used for Decoration in your Minecraft World! This is entirely client side, Mod Free!

## What Makes these Trees Unique?
There are many things about these trees that are unique from other packs.
- Glow-in-the-dark Lights & Star
- Star & Lights turn "off" when crouched
- Dyeing your tree changes the Star's Color
- Armor Trim Pattern changes the Carpet Pattern (Silence, Sentry, etc)
- Armor Trim Material changes the Ornament Color (Diamond, Amethyst, etc)
- Unique Tree Shape not normally possible in vanilla 1.21.5 - 1.21.10


## How to make a Mini Christmas Tree
This resource pack uses Leather Armor like Boots, Helmet, Chestplate, and Leggings to be so customizable.
1. Download the Resource Pack & **Collect 1 Leather Armor Piece**.
2. **Rename the Leather Armor Piece to either "Mini Christmas Tree"**, "Carpetless Mini Christmas Tree", or "Basic Carpted Mini Christmas Tree". The Rest of the tutorial will assume you did the first option "Mini Christmas Tree"
3. Grab some dye and dye your Tree in the Crafting Table.
4. Grab an Armor Trim of your chosen Pattern, & an Armor Trim Material of your liking.
5. Trim your Christmas Tree in the Smithing Table.
